description: Scripted multi-turn conversations for Dimension 1 (conversation depth / turn-to-degradation). Each conversation plants recall targets at fixed user-turn indices and probes them at later indices, both verbatim and paraphrased. Facts and probes are abstract and PII-free by construction: no IPs, hostnames, container numbers, emails, names, or secrets. recall_threshold is the fraction of planted facts that must be recalled at a probe depth for that depth to count toward recall_ceiling_turns. coherence_sample_turns lists the user-turn indices whose model responses are sampled for the judged coherence axis.

facts.statement: For this planning chat, my favorite color is teal.
I am organizing the trip around the city of Zubrovka.

turns.text: For this planning chat, my favorite color is teal. Please remember that.
Good. I am organizing the trip around the city of Zubrovka.
What kinds of activities suit a long weekend?
Which city did I say I am organizing the trip around?
And remind me which color I told you I prefer for the theme.
